hebrew_text: בְּרֵאשִׁ֖ית בָּרָ֣א אֱלֹהִ֑ים אֵ֥ת הַשָּׁמַ֖יִם וְאֵ֥ת הָאָֽרֶץ׃
koren_translation: IN THE BEGINNING God created the heaven and the earth.
metsudah_translation: In the beginning Elohim created the heavens and the earth.

hebrew_text: בְּרֵאשִׁ֖ית בָּרָ֣א אֱלֹהִ֑ים אֵ֥ת הַשָּׁמַ֖יִם וְאֵ֥ת הָאָֽרֶץ׃
koren_translation: IN THE BEGINNING God created the heaven and the earth.
metsudah_translation: In the beginning Elohim created the heavens and the earth.

hebrew_text: בְּרֵאשִׁ֖ית בָּרָ֣א אֱלֹהִ֑ים אֵ֥ת הַשָּׁמַ֖יִם וְאֵ֥ת הָאָֽרֶץ׃
koren_translation: IN THE BEGINNING God created the heaven and the earth.
metsudah_translation: In the beginning Elohim created the heavens and the earth.

hebrew_text: בְּרֵאשִׁ֖ית בָּרָ֣א אֱלֹהִ֑ים אֵ֥ת הַשָּׁמַ֖יִם וְאֵ֥ת הָאָֽרֶץ׃
koren_translation: IN THE BEGINNING God created the heaven and the earth.
metsudah_translation: In the beginning Elohim created the heavens and the earth.

hebrew_text: בְּרֵאשִׁ֖ית בָּרָ֣א אֱלֹהִ֑ים אֵ֥ת הַשָּׁמַ֖יִם וְאֵ֥ת הָאָֽרֶץ׃
koren_translation: IN THE BEGINNING God created the heaven and the earth.
metsudah_translation: In the beginning Elohim created the heavens and the earth.

hebrew_text: בְּרֵאשִׁ֖ית בָּרָ֣א אֱלֹהִ֑ים אֵ֥ת הַשָּׁמַ֖יִם וְאֵ֥ת הָאָֽרֶץ׃
koren_translation: IN THE BEGINNING God created the heaven and the earth.
metsudah_translation: In the beginning Elohim created the heavens and the earth.

hebrew_text: וְהָאָ֗רֶץ הָיְתָ֥ה תֹ֙הוּ֙ וָבֹ֔הוּ וְחֹ֖שֶׁךְ עַל־פְּנֵ֣י תְה֑וֹם וְר֣וּחַ אֱלֹהִ֔ים מְרַחֶ֖פֶת עַל־פְּנֵ֥י הַמָּֽיִם׃
koren_translation: And the earth was without form and void; and darkness was on the face of the deep. And a wind from God moved over the surface of the waters.
metsudah_translation: The earth was unformed and desolate, and (there was) darkness over the surface of the abyss. The breath of Elohim hovered above the surface of the water.

hebrew_text: וְהָאָ֗רֶץ הָיְתָ֥ה תֹ֙הוּ֙ וָבֹ֔הוּ וְחֹ֖שֶׁךְ עַל־פְּנֵ֣י תְה֑וֹם וְר֣וּחַ אֱלֹהִ֔ים מְרַחֶ֖פֶת עַל־פְּנֵ֥י הַמָּֽיִם׃
koren_translation: And the earth was without form and void; and darkness was on the face of the deep. And a wind from God moved over the surface of the waters.
metsudah_translation: The earth was unformed and desolate, and (there was) darkness over the surface of the abyss. The breath of Elohim hovered above the surface of the water.

hebrew_text: וַיֹּ֥אמֶר אֱלֹהִ֖ים יְהִ֣י א֑וֹר וַֽיְהִי־אֽוֹר׃
koren_translation: And God said, Let there be light: and there was light.
metsudah_translation: Elohim said, Let there be light. and there was light.

hebrew_text: וַיֹּ֥אמֶר אֱלֹהִ֖ים יְהִ֣י א֑וֹר וַֽיְהִי־אֽוֹר׃
koren_translation: And God said, Let there be light: and there was light.
metsudah_translation: Elohim said, Let there be light. and there was light.

hebrew_text: וַיַּ֧רְא אֱלֹהִ֛ים אֶת־הָא֖וֹר כִּי־ט֑וֹב וַיַּבְדֵּ֣ל אֱלֹהִ֔ים בֵּ֥ין הָא֖וֹר וּבֵ֥ין הַחֹֽשֶׁךְ׃
koren_translation: And God saw the light, that it was good: and God divided the light from the darkness.
metsudah_translation: Elohim saw that the light was good, and Elohim divided the light from the darkness.

hebrew_text: וַיַּ֧רְא אֱלֹהִ֛ים אֶת־הָא֖וֹר כִּי־ט֑וֹב וַיַּבְדֵּ֣ל אֱלֹהִ֔ים בֵּ֥ין הָא֖וֹר וּבֵ֥ין הַחֹֽשֶׁךְ׃
koren_translation: And God saw the light, that it was good: and God divided the light from the darkness.
metsudah_translation: Elohim saw that the light was good, and Elohim divided the light from the darkness.

hebrew_text: וַיִּקְרָ֨א אֱלֹהִ֤ים ׀ לָאוֹר֙ י֔וֹם וְלַחֹ֖שֶׁךְ קָ֣רָא לָ֑יְלָה וַֽיְהִי־עֶ֥רֶב וַֽיְהִי־בֹ֖קֶר י֥וֹם אֶחָֽד׃
koren_translation: And God called the light Day, and the darkness He called Night. And there was evening and there was morning, one day.
metsudah_translation: Elohim called the light day, and the darkness He called night. It became evening and it became morning, one day.

hebrew_text: וַיִּקְרָ֨א אֱלֹהִ֤ים ׀ לָאוֹר֙ י֔וֹם וְלַחֹ֖שֶׁךְ קָ֣רָא לָ֑יְלָה וַֽיְהִי־עֶ֥רֶב וַֽיְהִי־בֹ֖קֶר י֥וֹם אֶחָֽד׃
koren_translation: And God called the light Day, and the darkness He called Night. And there was evening and there was morning, one day.
metsudah_translation: Elohim called the light day, and the darkness He called night. It became evening and it became morning, one day.

hebrew_text: וַיֹּ֣אמֶר אֱלֹהִ֗ים יִקָּו֨וּ הַמַּ֜יִם מִתַּ֤חַת הַשָּׁמַ֙יִם֙ אֶל־מָק֣וֹם אֶחָ֔ד וְתֵרָאֶ֖ה הַיַּבָּשָׁ֑ה וַֽיְהִי־כֵֽן׃
koren_translation: And God said, Let the waters under the heaven be gathered together to one place, and let the dry land appear: and it was so.
metsudah_translation: Elohim said, Let the waters beneath the heavens be gathered into one place, and let the dryness be seen. It was so.

hebrew_text: וַיֹּ֣אמֶר אֱלֹהִ֗ים יִקָּו֨וּ הַמַּ֜יִם מִתַּ֤חַת הַשָּׁמַ֙יִם֙ אֶל־מָק֣וֹם אֶחָ֔ד וְתֵרָאֶ֖ה הַיַּבָּשָׁ֑ה וַֽיְהִי־כֵֽן׃
koren_translation: And God said, Let the waters under the heaven be gathered together to one place, and let the dry land appear: and it was so.
metsudah_translation: Elohim said, Let the waters beneath the heavens be gathered into one place, and let the dryness be seen. It was so.

hebrew_text: וַיִּקְרָ֨א אֱלֹהִ֤ים ׀ לַיַּבָּשָׁה֙ אֶ֔רֶץ וּלְמִקְוֵ֥ה הַמַּ֖יִם קָרָ֣א יַמִּ֑ים וַיַּ֥רְא אֱלֹהִ֖ים כִּי־טֽוֹב׃
koren_translation: And God called the dry land Earth; and the gathering together of the waters He called Seas: and God saw that it was good.
metsudah_translation: Elohim called the dryness, earth, and the gathering of the waters, He called seas, and Elohim saw that it was good.

hebrew_text: וַיִּקְרָ֨א אֱלֹהִ֤ים ׀ לַיַּבָּשָׁה֙ אֶ֔רֶץ וּלְמִקְוֵ֥ה הַמַּ֖יִם קָרָ֣א יַמִּ֑ים וַיַּ֥רְא אֱלֹהִ֖ים כִּי־טֽוֹב׃
koren_translation: And God called the dry land Earth; and the gathering together of the waters He called Seas: and God saw that it was good.
metsudah_translation: Elohim called the dryness, earth, and the gathering of the waters, He called seas, and Elohim saw that it was good.

hebrew_text: וַיֹּ֣אמֶר אֱלֹהִ֗ים יְהִ֤י מְאֹרֹת֙ בִּרְקִ֣יעַ הַשָּׁמַ֔יִם לְהַבְדִּ֕יל בֵּ֥ין הַיּ֖וֹם וּבֵ֣ין הַלָּ֑יְלָה וְהָי֤וּ לְאֹתֹת֙ וּלְמ֣וֹעֲדִ֔ים וּלְיָמִ֖ים וְשָׁנִֽים׃
koren_translation: And God said, Let there be lights in the firmament of heaven to divide the day from the night; and let them be for signs, and for seasons, and for days, and years:
metsudah_translation: Elohim said, Let there be lights in the canopy of heaven to divide between the day and the night, and they will serve for signs for seasons, (for) days and (for) years.

hebrew_text: וַיֹּ֣אמֶר אֱלֹהִ֗ים יְהִ֤י מְאֹרֹת֙ בִּרְקִ֣יעַ הַשָּׁמַ֔יִם לְהַבְדִּ֕יל בֵּ֥ין הַיּ֖וֹם וּבֵ֣ין הַלָּ֑יְלָה וְהָי֤וּ לְאֹתֹת֙ וּלְמ֣וֹעֲדִ֔ים וּלְיָמִ֖ים וְשָׁנִֽים׃
koren_translation: And God said, Let there be lights in the firmament of heaven to divide the day from the night; and let them be for signs, and for seasons, and for days, and years:
metsudah_translation: Elohim said, Let there be lights in the canopy of heaven to divide between the day and the night, and they will serve for signs for seasons, (for) days and (for) years.

hebrew_text: וַיְכַ֤ל אֱלֹהִים֙ בַּיּ֣וֹם הַשְּׁבִיעִ֔י מְלַאכְתּ֖וֹ אֲשֶׁ֣ר עָשָׂ֑ה וַיִּשְׁבֹּת֙ בַּיּ֣וֹם הַשְּׁבִיעִ֔י מִכׇּל־מְלַאכְתּ֖וֹ אֲשֶׁ֥ר עָשָֽׂה׃
koren_translation: And by the seventh day God ended His work which He had done; and He rested on the seventh day from all His work which He had done.
metsudah_translation: Elohim completed by the seventh day His work which He had made, and He abstained on the seventh day from all His work which He had made.

hebrew_text: וַיְכַ֤ל אֱלֹהִים֙ בַּיּ֣וֹם הַשְּׁבִיעִ֔י מְלַאכְתּ֖וֹ אֲשֶׁ֣ר עָשָׂ֑ה וַיִּשְׁבֹּת֙ בַּיּ֣וֹם הַשְּׁבִיעִ֔י מִכׇּל־מְלַאכְתּ֖וֹ אֲשֶׁ֥ר עָשָֽׂה׃
koren_translation: And by the seventh day God ended His work which He had done; and He rested on the seventh day from all His work which He had done.
metsudah_translation: Elohim completed by the seventh day His work which He had made, and He abstained on the seventh day from all His work which He had made.

hebrew_text: וַיְבָ֧רֶךְ אֹתָ֛ם אֱלֹהִ֖ים לֵאמֹ֑ר פְּר֣וּ וּרְב֗וּ וּמִלְא֤וּ אֶת־הַמַּ֙יִם֙ בַּיַּמִּ֔ים וְהָע֖וֹף יִ֥רֶב בָּאָֽרֶץ׃
koren_translation: And God blessed them, saying, Be fruitful, and multiply, and fill the waters in the seas, and let birds multiply in the earth.
metsudah_translation: Elohim blessed them saying, Be fruitful and multiply, fill the waters of the seas, and let the birds multiply on the earth.

hebrew_text: וַיְבָ֧רֶךְ אֹתָ֛ם אֱלֹהִ֖ים לֵאמֹ֑ר פְּר֣וּ וּרְב֗וּ וּמִלְא֤וּ אֶת־הַמַּ֙יִם֙ בַּיַּמִּ֔ים וְהָע֖וֹף יִ֥רֶב בָּאָֽרֶץ׃
koren_translation: And God blessed them, saying, Be fruitful, and multiply, and fill the waters in the seas, and let birds multiply in the earth.
metsudah_translation: Elohim blessed them saying, Be fruitful and multiply, fill the waters of the seas, and let the birds multiply on the earth.

hebrew_text: וַיְבָ֧רֶךְ אֹתָ֛ם אֱלֹהִ֖ים לֵאמֹ֑ר פְּר֣וּ וּרְב֗וּ וּמִלְא֤וּ אֶת־הַמַּ֙יִם֙ בַּיַּמִּ֔ים וְהָע֖וֹף יִ֥רֶב בָּאָֽרֶץ׃
koren_translation: And God blessed them, saying, Be fruitful, and multiply, and fill the waters in the seas, and let birds multiply in the earth.
metsudah_translation: Elohim blessed them saying, Be fruitful and multiply, fill the waters of the seas, and let the birds multiply on the earth.

hebrew_text: וַיְבָ֧רֶךְ אֹתָ֛ם אֱלֹהִ֖ים לֵאמֹ֑ר פְּר֣וּ וּרְב֗וּ וּמִלְא֤וּ אֶת־הַמַּ֙יִם֙ בַּיַּמִּ֔ים וְהָע֖וֹף יִ֥רֶב בָּאָֽרֶץ׃
koren_translation: And God blessed them, saying, Be fruitful, and multiply, and fill the waters in the seas, and let birds multiply in the earth.
metsudah_translation: Elohim blessed them saying, Be fruitful and multiply, fill the waters of the seas, and let the birds multiply on the earth.

hebrew_text: בְּרֵאשִׁ֖ית בָּרָ֣א אֱלֹהִ֑ים אֵ֥ת הַשָּׁמַ֖יִם וְאֵ֥ת הָאָֽרֶץ׃
koren_translation: IN THE BEGINNING God created the heaven and the earth.
metsudah_translation: In the beginning Elohim created the heavens and the earth.

hebrew_text: בְּרֵאשִׁ֖ית בָּרָ֣א אֱלֹהִ֑ים אֵ֥ת הַשָּׁמַ֖יִם וְאֵ֥ת הָאָֽרֶץ׃
koren_translation: IN THE BEGINNING God created the heaven and the earth.
metsudah_translation: In the beginning Elohim created the heavens and the earth.

koren_translation: IN THE BEGINNING God created the heaven and the earth.
metsudah_translation: In the beginning Elohim created the heavens and the earth.

koren_translation: IN THE BEGINNING God created the heaven and the earth.

koren_translation: IN THE BEGINNING God created the heaven and the earth.
metsudah_translation: In the beginning Elohim created the heavens and the earth.

hebrew_text: בְּרֵאשִׁ֖ית בָּרָ֣א אֱלֹהִ֑ים אֵ֥ת הַשָּׁמַ֖יִם וְאֵ֥ת הָאָֽרֶץ׃
koren_translation: IN THE BEGINNING God created the heaven and the earth.

metsudah_translation: Elohim called the light day, and the darkness He called night. It became evening and it became morning, one day.

hebrew_text: וַיִּקְרָ֨א אֱלֹהִ֤ים ׀ לַיַּבָּשָׁה֙ אֶ֔רֶץ וּלְמִקְוֵ֥ה הַמַּ֖יִם קָרָ֣א יַמִּ֑ים וַיַּ֥רְא אֱלֹהִ֖ים כִּי־טֽוֹב׃
koren_translation: And God called the dry land Earth; and the gathering together of the waters He called Seas: and God saw that it was good.
metsudah_translation: Elohim called the dryness, earth, and the gathering of the waters, He called seas, and Elohim saw that it was good.

hebrew_text: וַיִּקְרָ֨א אֱלֹהִ֤ים ׀ לַיַּבָּשָׁה֙ אֶ֔רֶץ וּלְמִקְוֵ֥ה הַמַּ֖יִם קָרָ֣א יַמִּ֑ים וַיַּ֥רְא אֱלֹהִ֖ים כִּי־טֽוֹב׃
koren_translation: And God called the dry land Earth; and the gathering together of the waters He called Seas: and God saw that it was good.
metsudah_translation: Elohim called the dryness, earth, and the gathering of the waters, He called seas, and Elohim saw that it was good.

hebrew_text: וַיֹּ֣אמֶר אֱלֹהִ֗ים יְהִ֤י מְאֹרֹת֙ בִּרְקִ֣יעַ הַשָּׁמַ֔יִם לְהַבְדִּ֕יל בֵּ֥ין הַיּ֖וֹם וּבֵ֣ין הַלָּ֑יְלָה וְהָי֤וּ לְאֹתֹת֙ וּלְמ֣וֹעֲדִ֔ים וּלְיָמִ֖ים וְשָׁנִֽים׃
koren_translation: And God said, Let there be lights in the firmament of heaven to divide the day from the night; and let them be for signs, and for seasons, and for days, and years:
metsudah_translation: Elohim said, Let there be lights in the canopy of heaven to divide between the day and the night, and they will serve for signs for seasons, (for) days and (for) years.

hebrew_text: וַיֹּ֣אמֶר אֱלֹהִ֗ים יְהִ֤י מְאֹרֹת֙ בִּרְקִ֣יעַ הַשָּׁמַ֔יִם לְהַבְדִּ֕יל בֵּ֥ין הַיּ֖וֹם וּבֵ֣ין הַלָּ֑יְלָה וְהָי֤וּ לְאֹתֹת֙ וּלְמ֣וֹעֲדִ֔ים וּלְיָמִ֖ים וְשָׁנִֽים׃
koren_translation: And God said, Let there be lights in the firmament of heaven to divide the day from the night; and let them be for signs, and for seasons, and for days, and years:
metsudah_translation: Elohim said, Let there be lights in the canopy of heaven to divide between the day and the night, and they will serve for signs for seasons, (for) days and (for) years.

hebrew_text: וְהָאָ֗רֶץ הָיְתָ֥ה תֹ֙הוּ֙ וָבֹ֔הוּ וְחֹ֖שֶׁךְ עַל־פְּנֵ֣י תְה֑וֹם וְר֣וּחַ אֱלֹהִ֔ים מְרַחֶ֖פֶת עַל־פְּנֵ֥י הַמָּֽיִם׃
koren_translation: And the earth was without form and void; and darkness was on the face of the deep. And a wind from God moved over the surface of the waters.
metsudah_translation: The earth was unformed and desolate, and (there was) darkness over the surface of the abyss. The breath of Elohim hovered above the surface of the water.

hebrew_text: וְהָאָ֗רֶץ הָיְתָ֥ה תֹ֙הוּ֙ וָבֹ֔הוּ וְחֹ֖שֶׁךְ עַל־פְּנֵ֣י תְה֑וֹם וְר֣וּחַ אֱלֹהִ֔ים מְרַחֶ֖פֶת עַל־פְּנֵ֥י הַמָּֽיִם׃
koren_translation: And the earth was without form and void; and darkness was on the face of the deep. And a wind from God moved over the surface of the waters.
metsudah_translation: The earth was unformed and desolate, and (there was) darkness over the surface of the abyss. The breath of Elohim hovered above the surface of the water.

hebrew_text: וַיֹּ֥אמֶר אֱלֹהִ֖ים יְהִ֣י א֑וֹר וַֽיְהִי־אֽוֹר׃
koren_translation: And God said, Let there be light: and there was light.
metsudah_translation: Elohim said, Let there be light. and there was light.

hebrew_text: וַיֹּ֥אמֶר אֱלֹהִ֖ים יְהִ֣י א֑וֹר וַֽיְהִי־אֽוֹר׃
koren_translation: And God said, Let there be light: and there was light.
metsudah_translation: Elohim said, Let there be light. and there was light.

hebrew_text: וַיְכַ֤ל אֱלֹהִים֙ בַּיּ֣וֹם הַשְּׁבִיעִ֔י מְלַאכְתּ֖וֹ אֲשֶׁ֣ר עָשָׂ֑ה וַיִּשְׁבֹּת֙ בַּיּ֣וֹם הַשְּׁבִיעִ֔י מִכׇּל־מְלַאכְתּ֖וֹ אֲשֶׁ֥ר עָשָֽׂה׃
koren_translation: And by the seventh day God ended His work which He had done; and He rested on the seventh day from all His work which He had done.
metsudah_translation: Elohim completed by the seventh day His work which He had made, and He abstained on the seventh day from all His work which He had made.

hebrew_text: וַיְכַ֤ל אֱלֹהִים֙ בַּיּ֣וֹם הַשְּׁבִיעִ֔י מְלַאכְתּ֖וֹ אֲשֶׁ֣ר עָשָׂ֑ה וַיִּשְׁבֹּת֙ בַּיּ֣וֹם הַשְּׁבִיעִ֔י מִכׇּל־מְלַאכְתּ֖וֹ אֲשֶׁ֥ר עָשָֽׂה׃
koren_translation: And by the seventh day God ended His work which He had done; and He rested on the seventh day from all His work which He had done.
metsudah_translation: Elohim completed by the seventh day His work which He had made, and He abstained on the seventh day from all His work which He had made.

hebrew_text: וַיַּ֧רְא אֱלֹהִ֛ים אֶת־הָא֖וֹר כִּי־ט֑וֹב וַיַּבְדֵּ֣ל אֱלֹהִ֔ים בֵּ֥ין הָא֖וֹר וּבֵ֥ין הַחֹֽשֶׁךְ׃
koren_translation: And God saw the light, that it was good: and God divided the light from the darkness.
metsudah_translation: Elohim saw that the light was good, and Elohim divided the light from the darkness.

hebrew_text: וַיַּ֧רְא אֱלֹהִ֛ים אֶת־הָא֖וֹר כִּי־ט֑וֹב וַיַּבְדֵּ֣ל אֱלֹהִ֔ים בֵּ֥ין הָא֖וֹר וּבֵ֥ין הַחֹֽשֶׁךְ׃
koren_translation: And God saw the light, that it was good: and God divided the light from the darkness.
metsudah_translation: Elohim saw that the light was good, and Elohim divided the light from the darkness.

hebrew_text: וַתּוֹצֵ֨א הָאָ֜רֶץ דֶּ֠שֶׁא עֵ֣שֶׂב מַזְרִ֤יעַ זֶ֙רַע֙ לְמִינֵ֔הוּ וְעֵ֧ץ עֹֽשֶׂה־פְּרִ֛י אֲשֶׁ֥ר זַרְעוֹ־ב֖וֹ לְמִינֵ֑הוּ וַיַּ֥רְא אֱלֹהִ֖ים כִּי־טֽוֹב׃
koren_translation: And the earth brought forth grass, herb yielding seed after its kind, and tree yielding fruit, whose seed was in itself, after its kind: and God saw that it was good.
metsudah_translation: The earth brought forth grass, herbs yielding seed of its kind, and trees bearing fruit which has in it seeds of its kind; and Elohim saw that it was good.

hebrew_text: וַתּוֹצֵ֨א הָאָ֜רֶץ דֶּ֠שֶׁא עֵ֣שֶׂב מַזְרִ֤יעַ זֶ֙רַע֙ לְמִינֵ֔הוּ וְעֵ֧ץ עֹֽשֶׂה־פְּרִ֛י אֲשֶׁ֥ר זַרְעוֹ־ב֖וֹ לְמִינֵ֑הוּ וַיַּ֥רְא אֱלֹהִ֖ים כִּי־טֽוֹב׃
koren_translation: And the earth brought forth grass, herb yielding seed after its kind, and tree yielding fruit, whose seed was in itself, after its kind: and God saw that it was good.
metsudah_translation: The earth brought forth grass, herbs yielding seed of its kind, and trees bearing fruit which has in it seeds of its kind; and Elohim saw that it was good.

hebrew_text: וַיֹּ֥אמֶר אֱלֹהִ֖ים יְהִ֣י א֑וֹר וַֽיְהִי־אֽוֹר׃
koren_translation: And God said, Let there be light: and there was light.
metsudah_translation: Elohim said, Let there be light. and there was light.

hebrew_text: וַיֹּ֥אמֶר אֱלֹהִ֖ים יְהִ֣י א֑וֹר וַֽיְהִי־אֽוֹר׃
koren_translation: And God said, Let there be light: and there was light.
metsudah_translation: Elohim said, Let there be light. and there was light.

hebrew_text: וַיַּ֧רְא אֱלֹהִ֛ים אֶת־הָא֖וֹר כִּי־ט֑וֹב וַיַּבְדֵּ֣ל אֱלֹהִ֔ים בֵּ֥ין הָא֖וֹר וּבֵ֥ין הַחֹֽשֶׁךְ׃
koren_translation: And God saw the light, that it was good: and God divided the light from the darkness.
metsudah_translation: Elohim saw that the light was good, and Elohim divided the light from the darkness.

hebrew_text: וַיַּ֧רְא אֱלֹהִ֛ים אֶת־הָא֖וֹר כִּי־ט֑וֹב וַיַּבְדֵּ֣ל אֱלֹהִ֔ים בֵּ֥ין הָא֖וֹר וּבֵ֥ין הַחֹֽשֶׁךְ׃
koren_translation: And God saw the light, that it was good: and God divided the light from the darkness.
metsudah_translation: Elohim saw that the light was good, and Elohim divided the light from the darkness.

hebrew_text: וַיִּקְרָ֨א אֱלֹהִ֤ים ׀ לָאוֹר֙ י֔וֹם וְלַחֹ֖שֶׁךְ קָ֣רָא לָ֑יְלָה וַֽיְהִי־עֶ֥רֶב וַֽיְהִי־בֹ֖קֶר י֥וֹם אֶחָֽד׃
koren_translation: And God called the light Day, and the darkness He called Night. And there was evening and there was morning, one day.
metsudah_translation: Elohim called the light day, and the darkness He called night. It became evening and it became morning, one day.

hebrew_text: וַיִּקְרָ֨א אֱלֹהִ֤ים ׀ לָאוֹר֙ י֔וֹם וְלַחֹ֖שֶׁךְ קָ֣רָא לָ֑יְלָה וַֽיְהִי־עֶ֥רֶב וַֽיְהִי־בֹ֖קֶר י֥וֹם אֶחָֽד׃
koren_translation: And God called the light Day, and the darkness He called Night. And there was evening and there was morning, one day.
metsudah_translation: Elohim called the light day, and the darkness He called night. It became evening and it became morning, one day.

hebrew_text: וַיַּ֧רְא אֱלֹהִ֛ים אֶת־הָא֖וֹר כִּי־ט֑וֹב וַיַּבְדֵּ֣ל אֱלֹהִ֔ים בֵּ֥ין הָא֖וֹר וּבֵ֥ין הַחֹֽשֶׁךְ׃
koren_translation: And God saw the light, that it was good: and God divided the light from the darkness.
metsudah_translation: Elohim saw that the light was good, and Elohim divided the light from the darkness.

hebrew_text: וַיַּ֧רְא אֱלֹהִ֛ים אֶת־הָא֖וֹר כִּי־ט֑וֹב וַיַּבְדֵּ֣ל אֱלֹהִ֔ים בֵּ֥ין הָא֖וֹר וּבֵ֥ין הַחֹֽשֶׁךְ׃
koren_translation: And God saw the light, that it was good: and God divided the light from the darkness.
metsudah_translation: Elohim saw that the light was good, and Elohim divided the light from the darkness.

hebrew_text: וְהָי֤וּ לִמְאוֹרֹת֙ בִּרְקִ֣יעַ הַשָּׁמַ֔יִם לְהָאִ֖יר עַל־הָאָ֑רֶץ וַֽיְהִי־כֵֽן׃
koren_translation: and let them be for lights in the firmament of heaven to give light upon the earth: and it was so.
metsudah_translation: They will be for lights in the canopy of heaven to illuminate the earth. And it was so.

hebrew_text: וְהָי֤וּ לִמְאוֹרֹת֙ בִּרְקִ֣יעַ הַשָּׁמַ֔יִם לְהָאִ֖יר עַל־הָאָ֑רֶץ וַֽיְהִי־כֵֽן׃
koren_translation: and let them be for lights in the firmament of heaven to give light upon the earth: and it was so.
metsudah_translation: They will be for lights in the canopy of heaven to illuminate the earth. And it was so.

hebrew_text: בְּרֵאשִׁ֖ית בָּרָ֣א אֱלֹהִ֑ים אֵ֥ת הַשָּׁמַ֖יִם וְאֵ֥ת הָאָֽרֶץ׃
koren_translation: IN THE BEGINNING God created the heaven and the earth.
metsudah_translation: In the beginning Elohim created the heavens and the earth.

hebrew_text: בְּרֵאשִׁ֖ית בָּרָ֣א אֱלֹהִ֑ים אֵ֥ת הַשָּׁמַ֖יִם וְאֵ֥ת הָאָֽרֶץ׃
koren_translation: IN THE BEGINNING God created the heaven and the earth.
metsudah_translation: In the beginning Elohim created the heavens and the earth.

hebrew_text: וְהָאָ֗רֶץ הָיְתָ֥ה תֹ֙הוּ֙ וָבֹ֔הוּ וְחֹ֖שֶׁךְ עַל־פְּנֵ֣י תְה֑וֹם וְר֣וּחַ אֱלֹהִ֔ים מְרַחֶ֖פֶת עַל־פְּנֵ֥י הַמָּֽיִם׃
koren_translation: And the earth was without form and void; and darkness was on the face of the deep. And a wind from God moved over the surface of the waters.
metsudah_translation: The earth was unformed and desolate, and (there was) darkness over the surface of the abyss. The breath of Elohim hovered above the surface of the water.

hebrew_text: וְהָאָ֗רֶץ הָיְתָ֥ה תֹ֙הוּ֙ וָבֹ֔הוּ וְחֹ֖שֶׁךְ עַל־פְּנֵ֣י תְה֑וֹם וְר֣וּחַ אֱלֹהִ֔ים מְרַחֶ֖פֶת עַל־פְּנֵ֥י הַמָּֽיִם׃
koren_translation: And the earth was without form and void; and darkness was on the face of the deep. And a wind from God moved over the surface of the waters.
metsudah_translation: The earth was unformed and desolate, and (there was) darkness over the surface of the abyss. The breath of Elohim hovered above the surface of the water.

hebrew_text: וַיִּקְרָ֨א אֱלֹהִ֤ים ׀ לַיַּבָּשָׁה֙ אֶ֔רֶץ וּלְמִקְוֵ֥ה הַמַּ֖יִם קָרָ֣א יַמִּ֑ים וַיַּ֥רְא אֱלֹהִ֖ים כִּי־טֽוֹב׃
koren_translation: And God called the dry land Earth; and the gathering together of the waters He called Seas: and God saw that it was good.
metsudah_translation: Elohim called the dryness, earth, and the gathering of the waters, He called seas, and Elohim saw that it was good.

hebrew_text: וַיֹּ֣אמֶר אֱלֹהִ֗ים יְהִ֤י מְאֹרֹת֙ בִּרְקִ֣יעַ הַשָּׁמַ֔יִם לְהַבְדִּ֕יל בֵּ֥ין הַיּ֖וֹם וּבֵ֣ין הַלָּ֑יְלָה וְהָי֤וּ לְאֹתֹת֙ וּלְמ֣וֹעֲדִ֔ים וּלְיָמִ֖ים וְשָׁנִֽים׃
koren_translation: And God said, Let there be lights in the firmament of heaven to divide the day from the night; and let them be for signs, and for seasons, and for days, and years:
metsudah_translation: Elohim said, Let there be lights in the canopy of heaven to divide between the day and the night, and they will serve for signs for seasons, (for) days and (for) years.

hebrew_text: בְּרֵאשִׁ֖ית בָּרָ֣א אֱלֹהִ֑ים אֵ֥ת הַשָּׁמַ֖יִם וְאֵ֥ת הָאָֽרֶץ׃
koren_translation: IN THE BEGINNING God created the heaven and the earth.
metsudah_translation: In the beginning Elohim created the heavens and the earth.

hebrew_text: וַיַּ֧רְא אֱלֹהִ֛ים אֶת־הָא֖וֹר כִּי־ט֑וֹב וַיַּבְדֵּ֣ל אֱלֹהִ֔ים בֵּ֥ין הָא֖וֹר וּבֵ֥ין הַחֹֽשֶׁךְ׃
koren_translation: And God saw the light, that it was good: and God divided the light from the darkness.
metsudah_translation: Elohim saw that the light was good, and Elohim divided the light from the darkness.

hebrew_text: וְהָאָ֗רֶץ הָיְתָ֥ה תֹ֙הוּ֙ וָבֹ֔הוּ וְחֹ֖שֶׁךְ עַל־פְּנֵ֣י תְה֑וֹם וְר֣וּחַ אֱלֹהִ֔ים מְרַחֶ֖פֶת עַל־פְּנֵ֥י הַמָּֽיִם׃
koren_translation: And the earth was without form and void; and darkness was on the face of the deep. And a wind from God moved over the surface of the waters.
metsudah_translation: The earth was unformed and desolate, and (there was) darkness over the surface of the abyss. The breath of Elohim hovered above the surface of the water.

hebrew_text: וַיֹּ֥אמֶר אֱלֹהִ֖ים יְהִ֣י א֑וֹר וַֽיְהִי־אֽוֹר׃
koren_translation: And God said, Let there be light: and there was light.
metsudah_translation: Elohim said, Let there be light. and there was light.

hebrew_text: בְּרֵאשִׁ֖ית בָּרָ֣א אֱלֹהִ֑ים אֵ֥ת הַשָּׁמַ֖יִם וְאֵ֥ת הָאָֽרֶץ׃
koren_translation: IN THE BEGINNING God created the heaven and the earth.
metsudah_translation: In the beginning Elohim created the heavens and the earth.

hebrew_text: בְּרֵאשִׁ֖ית בָּרָ֣א אֱלֹהִ֑ים אֵ֥ת הַשָּׁמַ֖יִם וְאֵ֥ת הָאָֽרֶץ׃
koren_translation: IN THE BEGINNING God created the heaven and the earth.
metsudah_translation: In the beginning Elohim created the heavens and the earth.

hebrew_text: וַיֹּ֣אמֶר אֱלֹהִ֔ים יְהִ֥י רָקִ֖יעַ בְּת֣וֹךְ הַמָּ֑יִם וִיהִ֣י מַבְדִּ֔יל בֵּ֥ין מַ֖יִם לָמָֽיִם׃
koren_translation: And God said, Let there be a firmament in the midst of the waters, and let it divide water from water.
metsudah_translation: Elohim said, Let there be a canopy in the midst of the waters, and let it divide between waters and waters.

hebrew_text: וַיֹּ֣אמֶר אֱלֹהִ֗ים יִקָּו֨וּ הַמַּ֜יִם מִתַּ֤חַת הַשָּׁמַ֙יִם֙ אֶל־מָק֣וֹם אֶחָ֔ד וְתֵרָאֶ֖ה הַיַּבָּשָׁ֑ה וַֽיְהִי־כֵֽן׃
koren_translation: And God said, Let the waters under the heaven be gathered together to one place, and let the dry land appear: and it was so.
metsudah_translation: Elohim said, Let the waters beneath the heavens be gathered into one place, and let the dryness be seen. It was so.

hebrew_text: וְהָאָ֗רֶץ הָיְתָ֥ה תֹ֙הוּ֙ וָבֹ֔הוּ וְחֹ֖שֶׁךְ עַל־פְּנֵ֣י תְה֑וֹם וְר֣וּחַ אֱלֹהִ֔ים מְרַחֶ֖פֶת עַל־פְּנֵ֥י הַמָּֽיִם׃
koren_translation: And the earth was without form and void; and darkness was on the face of the deep. And a wind from God moved over the surface of the waters.
metsudah_translation: The earth was unformed and desolate, and (there was) darkness over the surface of the abyss. The breath of Elohim hovered above the surface of the water.
